## Meeting Purpose

[Sync and deep dive on GrowthX's work with Homebase, focusing on SEO strategy, content optimization, and aligning on future initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Homebase aims to double starter trials by year-end, focusing on organic sign-ups and SEO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2835.0)
  - [GrowthX presented new workflows for article refreshes and PSEO, with plans to scale and customize for Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2334.0)
  - [Key focus areas: improving SEO performance, experimenting with AI-driven content strategies, and enhancing conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
  - [Homebase's content strategy has matured from "baby to toddler" level, with room for significant growth in organic channels](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=3408.0)

## Topics

### Current Performance and Goals

  - [Homebase is trending at 105% of financial plan goal for H2](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2835.0)
  - [Primary KPIs: organic sign-ups and "starter" conversions (new businesses)](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2835.0)
  - [SEO converts better: 20% of sign-ups but 33% of paid customers and total MRR](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=3516.0)
  - [Aim to reduce reliance on paid acquisition and strengthen organic channels](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=3541.0)

### Product Strengths and Customer Feedback

  - [Ease of use in scheduling, especially recreating past schedules](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)
  - [Seamless integration of time tracking and scheduling with payroll](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)
  - [Strong mobile experience for employees](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2743.0)
  - [Comprehensive ecosystem for new businesses (job posting, recruitment, onboarding, scheduling, time tracking, payroll)](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO Improvements

  - [Content strategy has evolved from "slapping up blogs" to more strategic, regular, and quality-focused approach](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=3424.0)
  - [Need to strengthen SEO and GEO as subchannels within organic](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=3501.0)
  - [GrowthX presented workflows for article refreshes and PSEO to scale content production](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2334.0)
  - [Plans to implement AI-driven content strategies, including TLDR sections and potential ChatGPT integration](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2334.0)

### Competitive Landscape and Integration

  - [Integration with existing systems (QuickBooks, Gusto, POS) is a key consideration for prospects](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=3262.0)
  - [Homebase's built-in payroll is a unique selling point among scheduling competitors](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=3271.0)
  - [Challenge: prospects often already have payroll systems in place, making it harder to switch](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=3275.0)

### AI and LLM Strategies

  - [Implementing TLDR sections for better Google indexing and LLM citations](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2698.0)
  - [Exploring tools like Scrunch for LLM citation tracking and insights](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=3620.0)
  - [Considering experiments with AI-summarized content and ChatGPT integration](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=2334.0)

### Growth Challenges and Opportunities

  - [Need to mature organic channels to reduce reliance on paid acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=3541.0)
  - [Goal: transition from 10% growth to 50% growth company](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=3557.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage SEO's higher conversion rates to drive more sign-ups and paid customers](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=3516.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to refresh and share updated artifacts before next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=4064.0)
  - [Schedule a 30-minute follow-up call for next week to maintain momentum](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=4114.0)
  - [Finalize plans for moving forward with identified opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=4082.0)
  - [Jess to continue template discussions with Mark for "how to start a business" content](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=4092.0)
  - [Prepare for launching state-specific payroll calculation pages in the next 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=4098.0)
  - [Deep dive into company context, personas, and brand voice in upcoming meetings](https://fathom.video/share/3M6MzJV9CBpak5Wr-Mz66x5BJxVYXt6x?tab=summary&timestamp=4077.0)
